description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of dark and light wall panels, large windows, and a prominent garage attached to the front. The property includes a paved driveway, a car parked outside, and landscaped areas with several trees and shrubs. The backyard has a patio area with outdoor furniture, suggesting a space for relaxation or entertaining. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows providing ample natural light. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and a small overhang, blending seamlessly into the overall geometric design.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and landscaped yard with patio and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway, main entry, and landscaped front yard with trees and a car.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, outdoor furniture, and additional trees, with the garage and driveway visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the large windows, patio area, and the geometric lines of the house, with trees framing the property.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the rear patio, outdoor seating, and the contrast between dark and light wall panels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, flush with the facade, and no prominent decorative elements
